Comments: All interactions were warm and friendly, with smiles, eye contact and natural conversations.
Visit Summary:
We really enjoyed the visit, with all team members finding the games easy to use and a fun activity. 
The drinks were great, all arriving quickly, and were cold and tasty.
The food was good, although two of the twelve items ordered did not arrive until chased, and came when the rest of the food was already eaten which was disappointing.
The service was friendly, but we didn't feel we were shown all of the functions, and we didn't receive a check back, nor were any of the empty glasses or plates cleared away.
The booking process was easy, although it didn't give the pre-order options like I was expecting to see.

Comments: The chicken wings were really tasty, served warm, neatly presented in a bowl with a dipping sauce, and seemed good quality. We ordered them in 3 different flavours, being garlic, buffalo and Korean, and each had a distinctive and recognisable flavour.The sliders were also really tasty, served warm, neatly presented on a small plate and held in tact with a stick. We ordered sliders in 4 different flavours, being pulled pork, mushroom and halloumi, Korean chicken and smashed cheeseburger. All types were well cooked, seemed to be good quality and a delicious combination of flavours. We ordered chicken skewers in peri peri and souvalaki, and also chorizo skewers. They were all served warm, and neatly on a plate, crossed over and with a tasty dipping sauce. All skewers were well cooked, seemed to be good quality and a nice combination of flavours.Finally, we ordered fries and waffle fries. Both were served hot, and seemed to be straight out the fryer. They were tasty, well cooked and neatly presented in bowls. They seemed to be good quality.

Comments: The Diet Coke tasted as expected and was well carbonated. It was served chilled, and well presented in a long glass with ice and lime, and considered to be good quality.The watermelon bliss mocktail was delicious and refreshing, very light and crisp with a distinctive watermelon flavour. It was served chilled, very good quality and neatly presented in a wine glass with ice, a straw and a sprig of mint.The Moretti tasted as expected, was served chilled and was good quality. It was well presented in a clean and dry branded glass.The Guinness tasted as expected, was served chilled and was good quality. It was well presented in a clean and dry branded glass.The Old Mout cider tasted as expected, was served chilled and was good quality. It was well presented in its bottle with a clean and dry glass of ice, albeit of an incorrect brand.The Sweet Success cocktail was delicious, being fruity with a rich foam, and tasted very good quality. It was served chilled and neatly presented in a glass with a passion fruit garnish.

*]:pointer-events-auto [content-visibility:auto] supports-[content-visibility:auto]:[contain-intrinsic-size:auto_100lvh] R6Vx5W_threadScrollVars scroll-mb-[calc(var(--scroll-root-safe-area-inset-bottom,0px)+var(--thread-response-height))] scroll-mt-[calc(var(--header-height)+min(200px,max(70px,20svh)))]" dir="auto" data-turn-id="request-WEB:6c0f4b3b-3635-4a97-8197-03435f976f94-0" data-testid="conversation-turn-2" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="assistant">The idea of the brunch social was great, and we were really looking forward to it. It was advertised as unlimited pizza; however, the service did not reflect this. Over the course of two hours, our table of six was served only five pizzas, which was disappointing. Meanwhile, the group seated next to us appeared to receive a steady flow of pizzas, including some delivered both between and at the same time as ours.Our booking was from 2:30pm to 4:30pm. At 3:55pm, I asked if we would be receiving more pizza and was told yes. By 4:15pm, having still not received anything further (despite the neighbouring table being served again), I asked once more and was told no, as our time was up. When I pointed out that our booking ran until 4:30pm, the response changed to say we would receive more.At 5:00pm, two additional pizzas finally arrived. Unfortunately, by that point we had to leave, so we were unable to properly enjoy them. In total, over 2.5 hours, we received just seven pizzas between six people, and only after repeatedly asking.Overall, this was a very disappointing experience, especially as it was meant to be a birthday celebration.

Visit Summary:
From the moment we arrived, the staff were friendly, attentive, and made sure we had everything we needed throughout our visit. Service was smooth and efficient, with plates cleared promptly without ever feeling rushed.

The venue itself was clean, well-maintained, and had a great atmosphere that worked perfectly for a group outing. The food was excellent, with a wide variety of options that catered to everyone’s tastes, which made sharing and trying different dishes really enjoyable. The drinks' selection was equally impressive, offering plenty of choice and consistently good quality.

What really stood out was the interactive gaming experience. The range of darts games made it fun and accessible for everyone, including those in our group who had never played before. It created a lively, inclusive environment and added something unique to the overall experience.

Overall, it was a brilliant visit, combining great food, drinks, service, and entertainment. I’d highly recommend it for groups looking for something a bit different and memorable.

Based on this experience, we would be unlikely to recommend Flight Club to others. We felt that service was slow and inattentive, the food and drinks took a long time to be served once ordered. The food itself was very hit-and-miss, with some dishes being well portioned, flavoursome and delicious, whilst others were small and lacked flavour.
Visit Summary:
Our visit to Flight Club Westgate was overall quite disappointing. We were greeted immediately upon arrival, but only with a brief “hi.” Although the team member was friendly, the welcome could have been more enthusiastic.
When using the food and drink button to request service, a team member arrived within 3 minutes on the first occasion, but it took 8 minutes on the second. Our initial drinks were served within 7 minutes; however, our later food and drinks orders took almost 45 minutes in total to arrive.
The food was brought out at different times, with one dish arriving at 6:33pm, most dishes at 6:45pm, and the final dish not arriving until 6:52pm. We also did not receive our additional drinks until 6:55pm. We felt these wait times were excessive.
Unfortunately, we did not receive any check-backs during our visit, nor were we informed of any delays with the food. When we mentioned the long wait at the point of payment, the team did not appear particularly apologetic.
Some of the dishes we ordered were underwhelming, lacking flavour and not well portioned, although the food was mostly served hot and presented neatly.
On a positive note, the venue itself was clean and tidy throughout, the bar appeared well stocked, and the toilets were well maintained.
Areas for improvement would include providing more enthusiastic and attentive service, improving the speed and coordination of food and drink delivery, and reviewing the quality and preparation of some dishes.

When using the food and drink button to request service, a team member arrived within 3 minutes on the first occasion, but it took 8 minutes on the second. Our initial drinks were served within 7 minutes; however, our later food and drinks orders took almost 45 minutes in total to arrive.
The food was brought out at different times, with one dish arriving at 6:33pm, most dishes at 6:45pm, and the final dish not arriving until 6:52pm. We also did not receive our additional drinks until 6:55pm. We felt these wait times were excessive.
Unfortunately, we did not receive any check-backs during our visit, nor were we informed of any delays with the food. When we mentioned the long wait at the point of payment, the team did not appear particularly apologetic.
Some of the dishes we ordered were underwhelming, lacking flavour and not well portioned, although the food was mostly served hot and presented neatly.
On a positive note, the venue itself was clean and tidy throughout, the bar appeared well stocked, and the toilets were well maintained.
Areas for improvement would include providing more enthusiastic and attentive service, improving the speed and coordination of food and drink delivery, and reviewing the quality and preparation of some dishes.

Comments: We ordered a rhubarb lemonade, a ginger beer, an elderflower lemonade, still water and sparkling water. All drinks were served cold with clean glasses and ice. The rhubarb lemonade was nicely flavoured and pleasant to drink. The ginger beer was fiery and warming. The elderflower lemonade was a little disappointing, as the lemon overpowered any elderflower flavour. The still and sparkling waters were as expected.

Comments: We ordered the Margherita pizza, waffle fries, spicy chicken tacos, crispy pork belly sticks, Korean chicken sliders, chicken souvlaki sticks, corn and mushroom tacos, and halloumi sliders. We felt that the food was quite mixed, with some dishes being flavoursome and others lacking in seasoning and portion size. The Margherita pizza was a good portion size, served hot, evenly cooked and well presented. The waffle fries were served hot and neatly presented in a bowl but lacked seasoning. The spicy chicken tacos were tasty and flavoursome but a small portion size and difficult to eat. The crispy pork belly sticks had a good depth of flavour, were served hot and neatly presented, but the portion size was small. The Korean chicken sliders lacked flavour but were served hot. They weren't as visually appealing as some of the other dishes in regard to presentation. The chicken souvlaki sticks had no flavour and tasted of plain chicken. However, they were served hot. The presentation was also disappointing as opposed to the other dishes, as they looked quite anaemic, and the portion size was small. The corn and mushroom tacos were flavoursome but were missing the sweetcorn element of the dish. They were a small portion size and difficult to eat but served hot and looked appealing. Lastly, the halloumi sliders were neatly presented but served warm rather than hot. They had a good amount of filling and were presentable. They tasted as expected.

Comments: We visited both the male and female toilets. Both toilets were clean, tidy and well stocked. There was a small amount of toilet paper on the floor of one of the cubicles in the men's toilets, but otherwise they were in a good clean condition.
Visit Summary:
Our visit to Flight Club Westgate was overall quite disappointing. We were greeted immediately upon arrival, but only with a brief “hi.” Although the team member was friendly, the welcome could have been more enthusiastic.
When using the food and drink button to request service, a team member arrived within 3 minutes on the first occasion, but it took 8 minutes on the second. Our initial drinks were served within 7 minutes; however, our later food and drinks orders took almost 45 minutes in total to arrive.
The food was brought out at different times, with one dish arriving at 6:33pm, most dishes at 6:45pm, and the final dish not arriving until 6:52pm. We also did not receive our additional drinks until 6:55pm. We felt these wait times were excessive.
Unfortunately, we did not receive any check-backs during our visit, nor were we informed of any delays with the food. When we mentioned the long wait at the point of payment, the team did not appear particularly apologetic.
Some of the dishes we ordered were underwhelming, lacking flavour and not well portioned, although the food was mostly served hot and presented neatly.
On a positive note, the venue itself was clean and tidy throughout, the bar appeared well stocked, and the toilets were well maintained.
Areas for improvement would include providing more enthusiastic and attentive service, improving the speed and coordination of food and drink delivery, and reviewing the quality and preparation of some dishes.

I’ve been to flight club many times whilst living in London, had many birthdays etc and I like to visit different venues. As soon as the Reading location opened its bookings, I booked for the first day. The experience was nothing short of awful, drinks slow, some staff dismissive, bones in the food… However, that’s not the reason I wanted to provide a review. My friend and I asked to speak to the manager following our time playing, and we dealt with Rebecca. I wanted to just say how professional and excellent she is, because she saved the day. I genuinely think that if she hadn’t have dealt with our complaint as quickly and well as she had, I would probably never return to another flight club ever. She was really, really great and it was clear that the venue was chaotic but she was efficient and calm. Having spoken to her, I will 100% be giving the Reading location a second chance. I wanted to make sure that her effort and work was recognised because she really saved flight club and is an asset to the venue without a doubt. She turned a terrible experience into a positive (as much as possible) one, so thank you to Rebecca.
Was trying to find a contact email but can only seem to find this survey link. I wanted to give feedback about a particular team member at the Reading venue who is an actual credit to flight club.
